title: DOE Announces $15 Million to Develop Innovative Systems for Clean Hydrogen Production
content: The U.S. Department of Energy's (DOE's) Office of Fossil Energy and Carbon ManagementÂ today announced up to $15 millionÂ in federal funding to make clean hydrogen a more available and affordable fuel for electricity generation, industrial decarbonization, and transportation. The funding opportunity will support research and development projects that will enable the low-cost production of clean hydrogen.
author: Aru Somya
